CONTENT.Club career: On 22 May 2018, Tchimbembé signed his first professional contract with Troyes for three years. He made his professional debut with the club in a 2–1 Ligue 2 loss to Brest on 3 August 2018.On 23 July 2020, Tchimbembé signed a four-year contract with Ligue 1 side Metz. On 28 January 2022, he signed for Segunda División club Mirandés on loan for the rest of the 2021–22 season. On 2 August 2022, Tchimbembé moved on loan to Guingamp, with an option to buy.
CONTENT.External links: Warren Tchimbembé – French league stats at LFP – also available in French (archived)Warren Tchimbembé at Soccerway
CONTENT.International career: Born in France, Tchimbembé is of Republic of the Congo descent. He debuted with the Congo national team in a 1–1 2022 FIFA World Cup qualification tie with Togo on 9 October 2021.

SUMMARY: Warren Christopher Paul-Roger Tchimbembé (born 21 April 1998) is a professional footballer who plays as a midfielder. Born in France, he plays for the Congo national team.
